name: Cranberry Nut Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, sugar and salt.
2. Add the cranberries and nuts; toss to coat.
3. Stir in the melted butter, beaten eggs and almond extract (the mixture will be very thick if using frozen berries).
4. Spread into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream, if desired.
